message.content:
Review code quality for Tasks 5 and 6: Video generation routes and History/Folders CRUD.

WHAT_WAS_IMPLEMENTED: 9 new Flask routes in jake_desktop/app.py — POST /api/criativos/gerar-video, GET /api/criativos/status/<id>, GET/POST/DELETE /api/criativos/pastas, GET/POST/DELETE/PATCH /api/criativos/historico.

PLAN_OR_REQUIREMENTS: Tasks 5 and 6 from /root/docs/superpowers/plans/2026-03-21-fabrica-de-criativos.md

BASE_SHA: 77e5737f1ac4098ceb69c15a7e1b617fe9985766
HEAD_SHA: fab4273 (run `git log --oneline -3` in /root to get full SHA)

DESCRIPTION: Async video generation (returns prediction_id immediately, frontend polls status), and full CRUD for folders and paginated history.

Focus on: SQL injection risks in dynamic WHERE clause, DB connection cleanup (no connection leak), I2V validation correctness, error handling consistency.

content.text: I'll start by gathering all the necessary context in parallel.

content.content:
fab4273 feat: rotas criativos — gerar-video, status, histórico paginado e pastas (CRUD)
77e5737 feat: rota criativos/gerar-imagem — 5 modelos Replicate com polling síncrono
3d819af fix: criativos upload-imagem — limite 10MB e remove import duplicado
0bce465 feat: rotas criativos — upload-imagem, expandir-prompt, analisar-referencia
1b3f4a0 feat: migration — tabelas creative_folders e creative_history

jake_desktop/app.py

  +@login_required
  +def criativos_gerar_video():
  +    d = request.get_json() or {}
  +    prompt     = (d.get("prompt_expandido") or "").strip()

  +182 -0

1→# Fábrica de Criativos v2 — Implementation Plan
     2→
     3→> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.
     4→
     5→**Goal:** Substituir a Fábrica de Criativos atual por versão completa com geração de imagem/vídeo (11 modelos Replicate), 5 especialistas de prompt via Claude, upload de referência, histórico paginado com pastas, e skill global do Claude Code.
     6→
     7→**Architecture:** Backend Flask com 13 novas rotas em `app.py`; geração de vídeo assíncrona com polling via `GET /status/<prediction_id>`; frontend Split View (config esquerda / resultado direita) em IIFE Vanilla JS; banco Neon com 2 novas tabelas; skill Markdown com 5 engenheiros de prompt especializados.
     8→
     9→**Tech Stack:** Python/Flask, psycopg2 (Neon PostgreSQL), Replicate REST API (sem SDK), Anthropic claude-sonnet-4-6, Vanilla JS (IIFE), CSS Glassmorphism (padrão Jake OS)
    10→
    11→**Spec:** `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-03-21-fabrica-de-criativos-design.md`
    12→
    13→---
    14→
    15→## File Map
    16→
    17→| Arquivo | Ação | Responsabilidade |
    18→|---|---|---|
    19→| `scripts/migrar_criativos.py` | Criar | Migration one-shot: tabelas + índices |
    20→| `jake_desktop/app.py` | Modificar | 13 novas rotas `/api/criativos/*` (upload-imagem, expandir-prompt, analisar-referencia, gerar-imagem, gerar-video, status/\<id\>, historico GET, historico POST, historico/\<id\> DELETE, historico/\<id\>/pasta PATCH, pastas GET, pastas POST, pastas/\<id\> DELETE) |
    21→| `jake_desktop/templates/dashboard.html` | Modificar | Substituir seção `page-criativos` (linhas 690–840) + link CSS/JS |
    22→| `jake_desktop/static/js/criativos.js` | Criar | IIFE completo: layout, modos, upload, geração, histórico |
    23→| `jake_desktop/static/css/criativos.css` | Criar | Estilos da seção |
    24→| `~/.claude/skills/fabrica-de-criativos/SKILL.md` | Criar | Skill global com 5 especialistas de prompt |
    25→
    26→---
    27→
    28→## Mapeamento de Modelos (referência para toda a implementação)
    29→
    30→| Key (frontend/backend) | Slug Replicate | Tipo |
    31→|---|---|---|
    32→| `flux-1.1-pro` | `black-forest-labs/flux-1.1-pro` | imagem |
    33→| `flux-dev` | `black-forest-labs/flux-dev` | imagem |
    34→| `recraft-v3` | `recraft-ai/recraft-v3` | imagem |
    35→| `ideogram-v3-turbo` | `ideogram-ai/ideogram-v3-turbo` | imagem |
    36→| `imagen-4` | `google/imagen-4` | imagem |
    37→| `wan-t2v-fast` | `wavespeedai/wan-2.2-t2v-480p` | video T2V |
    38→| `wan-5b-fast` | `wavespeedai/wan-2.2-t2v-720p` | video T2V |
    39→| `hailuo-02` | `minimax/hailuo-02` | video T2V |
    40→| `seedance-lite` | `bytedance/seedance-1-lite` | video T2V |
    41→| `runway-gen4` | `runwayml/gen4-turbo` | video T2V |
    42→| `wan-i2v-fast` | `wavespeedai/wan-2.2-i2v-480p` | video I2V |
    43→
    44→---
    45→
    46→## Task 1: Claude Code Skill — 5 Especialistas de Prompt
    47→
    48→**Files:**
    49→- Create: `~/.claude/skills/fabrica-de-criativos/SKILL.md`
    50→
    51→- [ ] **Step 1: Criar diretório e arquivo da skill**
    52→
    53→```bash
    54→mkdir -p ~/.claude/skills/fabrica-de-criativos
    55→```
    56→
    57→Criar `~/.claude/skills/fabrica-de-criativos/SKILL.md`:
    58→
    59→```markdown
    60→---
    61→name: fabrica-de-criativos
    62→description: Use when generating AI images or videos for ad creatives, needing prompt engineering for Replicate models, or working on the Jake OS Fábrica de Criativos feature. Provides 5 specialized prompt engineers (Anúncios, Criativo, Psicodélico, Pessoas, Cena) and Replicate model reference.
    63→---
    64→
    65→# Fábrica de Criativos — Prompt Engineering Skill
    66→
    67→## Overview
    68→
    69→5 engenheiros de prompt especializados para geração de criativos com IA. Cada especialista expande um prompt simples em português para um prompt técnico profissional em inglês, otimizado para o tipo de criativo.
    70→
    71→**Regra universal:** Sempre gerar o prompt expandido em **inglês**. Manter o prompt expandido entre 50–120 palavras. Incluir sempre: sujeito principal, iluminação, estilo fotográfico/artístico, câmera/lente (quando aplicável), mood/atmosfera.
    72→
    73→---
    74→
    75→## Os 5 Especialistas
    76→
    77→### 🎯 Anúncios
    78→**Quando usar:** Criativos para Meta Ads, Google Ads, produtos, serviços, clínicas, negócios locais.
    79→
    80→**Estrutura canônica:**
    81→`[produto/serviço] advertisement, [sujeito + ação], [iluminação: studio/rim/softbox], [câmera: Canon/Sony 85mm f/1.4], commercial photography style, [background: clean/white/gradient], [color grading: warm/cool/neutral], [emoção: trust/confident/welcoming], Meta Ads format`
    82→
    83→**Vocabulário:** studio lighting, rim light, commercial photography, shallow depth of field, trust-inspiring, clean background, product hero shot, brand colors
    84→
    85→**Evitar:** artsy, experimental, surreal, cluttered backgrounds, dark moody tones
    86→
    87→**Exemplo:**
    88→- Simples: "clínica odontológica sorriso"
    89→- Expandido: "Professional dental clinic advertisement, confident woman smiling with perfect white teeth, soft studio lighting with rim light, shallow depth of field, Canon EOS R5 85mm f/1.4, commercial photography style, clean white background, warm color grading, trust-inspiring composition, Meta Ads format"
    90→
    91→---
    92→
    93→### 🎨 Conteúdo Criativo
    94→**Quando usar:** Arte conceitual, posts de redes sociais com apelo estético, storytelling visual, marcas de moda/lifestyle.
    95→
    96→**Estrutura canônica:**
    97→`[conceito] conceptual art, [sujeito + contexto], [composição: bold/dynamic/layered], [estilo: editorial/National Geographic/fine art], [iluminação: golden hour/dramatic/cinematic], [mood: narrative/emotional/striking], [técnica: high contrast/color grading]`
    98→
    99→**Vocabulário:** conceptual art, editorial style, bold composition, visual narrative, dynamic lighting, color contrast, fine art photography, storytelling
   100→

<system-reminder>

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

100→
   101→**Evitar:** genérico, stock photo look, plain backgrounds sem intenção
   102→
   103→**Exemplo:**
   104→- Simples: "mulher e natureza"
   105→- Expandido: "Editorial conceptual art, woman merging with lush tropical nature, bold color contrast, dynamic composition, National Geographic style, golden hour lighting, environmental storytelling, high contrast shadows, award-winning photography"
   106→
   107→---
   108→
   109→### 🌀 Psicodélico
   110→**Quando usar:** Arte generativa, covers musicais, conteúdo alternativo, eventos, marcas disruptivas.
   111→
   112→**Estrutura canônica:**
   113→`psychedelic [tema], [geometria: fractal/kaleidoscope/spiral], [paleta: neon/vibrant/cosmic], [referência: DMT-inspired/surrealist/dreamscape], ultra-detailed, 8K resolution, [técnica: liquid geometry/morphing/infinite recursion]`
   114→
   115→**Vocabulário:** psychedelic, fractal geometry, neon colors, surrealist, kaleidoscope, liquid geometry, cosmic, DMT-inspired, interdimensional, crystalline
   116→
   117→**Evitar:** fotorrealismo, tons apagados, composição convencional
   118→
   119→**Exemplo:**
   120→- Simples: "portal dimensional"
   121→- Expandido: "Psychedelic dimensional portal, fractal geometry spiraling into infinite cosmos, neon cyan and magenta hues, liquid geometry morphing, DMT-inspired visuals, ultra-detailed, 8K resolution, surrealist dreamscape, kaleidoscope symmetry, cosmic interdimensional gateway"
   122→
   123→---
   124→
   125→### 👤 Pessoas Realistas
   126→**Quando usar:** Retratos, personas de cliente, modelos para anúncios, conteúdo com pessoas.
   127→
   128→**Estrutura canônica:**
   129→`Hyperrealistic portrait, [sujeito: idade/gênero/etnia/expressão], [iluminação: Rembrandt/natural window/golden hour], skin texture with subsurface scattering, [câmera: Canon EOS R5 85mm f/1.2], shallow depth of field, [contexto/roupa], [mood: candid/professional/authentic]`
   130→
   131→**Vocabulário:** hyperrealistic, skin texture, subsurface scattering, natural light, bokeh, candid, Rembrandt lighting, photojournalism, authentic expression, pore detail
   132→
   133→**Evitar:** AI-looking skin, plastic textures, symmetry perfeita demais, olhos artificiais
   134→
   135→**Exemplo:**
   136→- Simples: "homem de negócios confiante"
   137→- Expandido: "Hyperrealistic portrait, confident businessman mid-40s, natural window light with Rembrandt lighting, skin texture with subsurface scattering, Canon EOS R5 85mm f/1.2, shallow depth of field, professional business attire, authentic expression, photojournalism style, 8K resolution"
   138→
   139→---
   140→
   141→### 🌆 Cena/Ambiente
   142→**Quando usar:** Paisagens urbanas, natureza, arquitetura, cenários para fundo de anúncios.
   143→
   144→**Estrutura canônica:**
   145→`Cinematic [tipo de cena], [horário/luz: golden hour/blue hour/overcast], [técnica de composição: leading lines/rule of thirds/symmetry], [efeito: volumetric light/atmospheric haze/long exposure], wide angle [mm], [referência: award-winning landscape/National Geographic], [mood: epic/serene/dramatic]`
   146→
   147→**Vocabulário:** wide angle, leading lines, atmospheric perspective, golden hour, volumetric light, establishing shot, rule of thirds, long exposure, atmospheric haze
   148→
   149→**Evitar:** composições planas, luz plana sem drama, perspectiva de smartphone
   150→
   151→**Exemplo:**
   152→- Simples: "cidade no pôr do sol"
   153→- Expandido: "Cinematic cityscape at golden hour, dramatic volumetric light rays, leading lines from architecture into infinite horizon, atmospheric haze, wide angle 16mm, rule of thirds composition, long exposure light trails, urban landscape photography, award-winning composition, National Geographic style"
   154→
   155→---
   156→
   157→## Replicate — Model IDs e Parâmetros
   158→
   159→### Imagem
   160→
   161→| Key | Slug | Melhor para | aspect_ratio padrão |
   162→|---|---|---|---|
   163→| `flux-1.1-pro` | `black-forest-labs/flux-1.1-pro` | Anúncios, Pessoas | 4:5 |
   164→| `flux-dev` | `black-forest-labs/flux-dev` | Criativo, qualidade alta | 4:5 |
   165→| `recraft-v3` | `recraft-ai/recraft-v3` | Design, UI, vetorial | 1:1 |
   166→| `ideogram-v3-turbo` | `ideogram-ai/ideogram-v3-turbo` | Texto em imagem, logos | 1:1 |
   167→| `imagen-4` | `google/imagen-4` | Fotorrealismo máximo | 4:5 |
   168→
   169→**Endpoint padrão imagem:** `POST https://api.replicate.com/v1/models/{slug}/predictions`
   170→**Headers:** `Authorization: Bearer {token}`, `Prefer: wait=60`
   171→
   172→### Vídeo
   173→
   174→| Key | Slug | Tipo | Duração típica | Custo |
   175→|---|---|---|---|---|
   176→| `wan-t2v-fast` | `wavespeedai/wan-2.2-t2v-480p` | T2V | ~30s geração | $ |
   177→| `wan-5b-fast` | `wavespeedai/wan-2.2-t2v-720p` | T2V | ~60s geração | $$ |
   178→| `hailuo-02` | `minimax/hailuo-02` | T2V | ~45s geração | $$ |
   179→| `seedance-lite` | `bytedance/seedance-1-lite` | T2V | ~60s geração | $$ |
   180→| `runway-gen4` | `runwayml/gen4-turbo` | T2V | ~30s geração | $$$ |
   181→| `wan-i2v-fast` | `wavespeedai/wan-2.2-i2v-480p` | I2V | ~45s geração | $ |
   182→
   183→**Endpoint vídeo:** `POST https://api.replicate.com/v1/models/{slug}/predictions` (sem `Prefer: wait`)
   184→**Polling:** `GET https://api.replicate.com/v1/predictions/{id}` a cada 3s
   185→```
   186→

   194→
   195→> **Nota:** `~/.claude/skills/` está fora do diretório do repositório (`/root`). Não usar `git add` neste path — causará erro "pathspec outside repository". A skill fica apenas em disco, disponível localmente para o Claude Code.
   196→
   197→---
   198→
   199→## Task 2: Migration — Tabelas no Neon
   200→
   201→**Files:**
   202→- Create: `scripts/migrar_criativos.py`
   203→
   204→- [ ] **Step 1: Criar script de migração**
   205→
   206→```python
   207→#!/usr/bin/env python3
   208→"""
   209→Script one-shot: cria tabelas creative_folders e creative_history no Neon.
   210→Executar: PYTHONPATH=/root python3 scripts/migrar_criativos.py
   211→"""
   212→import sys
   213→sys.path.insert(0, '/root')
   214→from core.db import get_conn
   215→
   216→SQL = """
   217→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS creative_folders (
   218→    id        SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
   219→    nome      VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
   220→    criado_em TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW()
   221→);
   222→
   223→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS creative_history (
   224→    id               SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
   225→    tipo             VARCHAR(10)  NOT NULL CHECK (tipo IN ('imagem','video')),
   226→    modo             VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL,
   227→    modelo           VARCHAR(50)  NOT NULL,
   228→    prompt_original  TEXT         NOT NULL,
   229→    prompt_expandido TEXT         NOT NULL,
   230→    url_resultado    TEXT         NOT NULL,
   231→    folder_id        INTEGER      REFERENCES creative_folders(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
   232→    criado_em        TIMESTAMP    DEFAULT NOW()
   233→);
   234→
   235→CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_creative_history_tipo    ON creative_history(tipo);
   236→CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_creative_history_folder  ON creative_history(folder_id);
   237→CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_creative_history_criado  ON creative_history(criado_em DESC);
   238→"""
   239→
   240→if __name__ == "__main__":
   241→    conn = get_conn()
   242→    try:
   243→        cur = conn.cursor()
   244→        cur.execute(SQL)
   245→        conn.commit()
   246→        print("✓ Tabelas creative_folders e creative_history criadas com sucesso.")
   247→    except Exception as e:
   248→        print(f"✕ Erro: {e}")
   249→        sys.exit(1)
   250→    finally:
   251→        conn.close()
   252→```
   253→
   254→- [ ] **Step 2: Executar migração**
   255→
   256→```bash
   257→PYTHONPATH=/root /root/venv/bin/python3 /root/scripts/migrar_criativos.py
   258→```
   259→
   260→Expected: `✓ Tabelas creative_folders e creative_history criadas com sucesso.`
   261→
   262→- [ ] **Step 3: Verificar tabelas**
   263→
   264→```bash
   265→PYTHONPATH=/root /root/venv/bin/python3 -c "
   266→from core.db import get_conn
   267→conn = get_conn()
   268→cur = conn.cursor()
   269→cur.execute(\"SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name IN ('creative_folders','creative_history')\")
   270→print(cur.fetchall())
   271→conn.close()
   272→"
   273→```
   274→
   275→Expected: `[('creative_folders',), ('creative_history',)]`
   276→
   277→- [ ] **Step 4: Commit**
   278→
   279→```bash
   280→git add scripts/migrar_criativos.py
   281→git commit -m "feat: migration — tabelas creative_folders e creative_history"
   282→```
   283→
   284→---
   285→
   286→## Task 3: Backend — Upload de Imagem e Prompt Engineering
   287→
   288→**Files:**
   289→- Modify: `jake_desktop/app.py`
   290→
   291→Adicionar as constantes e funções auxiliares antes do bloco `if __name__ == "__main__":`.
   292→
   293→> **Helpers já existentes em `app.py` (não redefinir):**
   294→> - `_get_db()` — linha 42. Abre conexão Neon com `RealDictCursor`, portanto `cur.fetchone()["id"]` funciona.
   295→> - `_anthropic_client()` — linha 316. Retorna cliente Anthropic ou `None` se sem chave.
   296→
   297→- [ ] **Step 1: Adicionar constantes de modelos e helpers no app.py**
   298→

   346→        "liquid geometry, cosmic themes, ultra-detailed, 8K resolution, surrealist dreamscape. "
   347→        "Return ONLY the expanded prompt, no explanation, no quotes, 50-120 words."
   348→    ),
   349→    "pessoas": (
   350→        "You are an expert portrait and fashion photographer. "
   351→        "Expand simple Portuguese prompts into professional English image/video generation prompts. "
   352→        "Focus on: hyperrealistic skin texture, subsurface scattering, Rembrandt or natural window lighting, "
   353→        "Canon EOS R5 85mm f/1.2, shallow depth of field, authentic candid expressions, photojournalism style. "
   354→        "Return ONLY the expanded prompt, no explanation, no quotes, 50-120 words."
   355→    ),
   356→    "cena": (
   357→        "You are an expert landscape and architectural photographer. "
   358→        "Expand simple Portuguese prompts into professional English image/video generation prompts. "
   359→        "Focus on: cinematic wide angle (16mm), leading lines, volumetric light, golden hour, atmospheric haze, "
   360→        "rule of thirds, long exposure, National Geographic / award-winning landscape style. "
   361→        "Return ONLY the expanded prompt, no explanation, no quotes, 50-120 words."
   362→    ),
   363→}
   364→
   365→_REPLICATE_BASE = "https://api.replicate.com/v1"
   366→
   367→
   368→def _replicate_headers():
   369→    token = os.getenv("REPLICATE_API_TOKEN", "").strip()
   370→    if not token:
   371→        raise RuntimeError("REPLICATE_API_TOKEN não configurado no .env")
   372→    return {"Authorization": f"Bearer {token}", "Content-Type": "application/json"}
   373→```
   374→
   375→- [ ] **Step 2: Adicionar rota de upload de imagem**
   376→
   377→Logo após as constantes acima:
   378→
   379→```python
   380→@app.route("/api/criativos/upload-imagem", methods=["POST"])
   381→@login_required
   382→def criativos_upload_imagem():
   383→    if "arquivo" not in request.files:
   384→        return jsonify({"error": "Campo 'arquivo' ausente"}), 400
   385→    arquivo = request.files["arquivo"]
   386→    file_bytes = arquivo.read()
   387→    mime = arquivo.content_type or "image/jpeg"
   388→    # base64 para análise via Claude
   389→    b64 = base64.b64encode(file_bytes).decode("utf-8")
   390→    # Upload para Replicate Files API para uso como URL em I2V
   391→    try:
   392→        headers = _replicate_headers()
   393→        headers.pop("Content-Type")  # multipart não usa Content-Type JSON
   394→        resp = requests.post(
   395→            f"{_REPLICATE_BASE}/files",
   396→            headers={"Authorization": headers["Authorization"]},
   397→            files={"content": (arquivo.filename or "upload", file_bytes, mime)},
   398→            timeout=30,
   399→        )
   400→        if not resp.ok:
   401→            return jsonify({"error": f"Replicate upload: {resp.text[:200]}"}), 500
   402→        url = resp.json().get("urls", {}).get("get") or resp.json().get("url", "")
   403→        return jsonify({"url": url, "base64": b64, "mime_type": mime, "ok": True})
   404→    except RuntimeError as e:
   405→        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
   406→    except Exception as e:
   407→        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
   408→```
   409→
   410→- [ ] **Step 3: Adicionar rota de expandir prompt**
   411→
   412→```python
   413→@app.route("/api/criativos/expandir-prompt", methods=["POST"])
   414→@login_required
   415→def criativos_expandir_prompt():
   416→    d = request.get_json() or {}
   417→    prompt = (d.get("prompt") or "").strip()
   418→    modo   = d.get("modo", "criativo")
   419→    tipo   = d.get("tipo", "imagem")
   420→    if not prompt:
   421→        return jsonify({"error": "Campo 'prompt' obrigatório"}), 400
   422→    if modo not in _CRIATIVOS_MODOS:
   423→        return jsonify({"error": f"modo inválido. Válidos: {list(_CRIATIVOS_MODOS)}"}), 400
   424→
   425→    client = _anthropic_client()
   426→    if not client:
   427→        return jsonify({"error": "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY não configurada"}), 500
   428→
   429→    system = _CRIATIVOS_SYSTEM_PROMPTS[modo]
   430→    tipo_hint = " Optimize for motion, camera movement, and temporal consistency." if tipo == "video" else ""
   431→    try:
   432→        msg = client.messages.create(
   433→            model="claude-sonnet-4-6",
   434→            max_tokens=200,
   435→            system=system + tipo_hint,
   436→            messages=[{"role": "user", "content": f"Expand this prompt: {prompt}"}],
   437→        )
   438→        return jsonify({"prompt_expandido": msg.content[0].text.strip()})
   439→    except Exception as e:
   440→        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
   441→```
   442→
   443→- [ ] **Step 4: Adicionar rota de análise de referência**
   444→
   445→```python
   446→@app.route("/api/criativos/analisar-referencia", methods=["POST"])
   447→@login_required
   448→def criativos_analisar_referencia():
   449→    d = request.get_json() or {}
   450→    b64  = d.get("imagem_base64", "")
   451→    mime = d.get("mime_type", "image/jpeg")
   452→    if not b64:
   453→        return jsonify({"error": "imagem_base64 obrigatório"}), 400
   454→
   455→    client = _anthropic_client()
   456→    if not client:
   457→        return jsonify({"error": "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY não configurada"}), 500
   458→
   459→    system = (
   460→        "You are an expert visual analyst and prompt engineer. "
   461→        "Analyze the image and return ONLY valid JSON with two fields: "
   462→        "'prompt_sugerido' (English prompt 50-120 words to recreate this visual style) and "
   463→        "'modo_sugerido' (one of: anuncios, criativo, psicodelico, pessoas, cena). "
   464→        "No markdown, no explanation, just the JSON object."
   465→    )
   466→    try:
   467→        msg = client.messages.create(
   468→            model="claude-sonnet-4-6",
   469→            max_tokens=300,
   470→            system=system,
   471→            messages=[{"role": "user", "content": [
   472→                {"type": "image", "source": {"type": "base64", "media_type": mime, "data": b64}},
   473→                {"type": "text",  "text": "Analyze this image and return the JSON."},
   474→            ]}],
   475→        )
   476→        raw = msg.content[0].text.strip()
   477→        if "```" in raw:
   478→            raw = raw.split("```")[1]
   479→            if raw.startswith("json\n"):
   480→                raw = raw[5:]
   481→        result = json.loads(raw)
   482→        # Validar modo_sugerido
   483→        if result.get("modo_sugerido") not in _CRIATIVOS_MODOS:
   484→            result["modo_sugerido"] = "criativo"
   485→        return jsonify(result)
   486→    except json.JSONDecodeError:
   487→        return jsonify({"error": "IA retornou formato inválido"}), 500
   488→    except Exception as e:
   489→        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
   490→```
   491→
   492→- [ ] **Step 5: Verificar sintaxe**

   505→```

   517→@app.route("/api/criativos/gerar-imagem", methods=["POST"])
   518→@login_required
   519→def criativos_gerar_imagem():
   520→    d = request.get_json() or {}
   521→    prompt  = (d.get("prompt_expandido") or "").strip()
   522→    modelo  = d.get("modelo", "flux-1.1-pro")
   523→    if not prompt:
   524→        return jsonify({"error": "prompt_expandido obrigatório"}), 400
   525→    if modelo not in _CRIATIVOS_MODELOS_IMAGEM:
   526→        return jsonify({"error": f"modelo inválido. Válidos: {list(_CRIATIVOS_MODELOS_IMAGEM)}"}), 400
   527→
   528→    slug = _CRIATIVOS_MODELOS_IMAGEM[modelo]
   529→    try:
   530→        headers = _replicate_headers()
   531→        headers["Prefer"] = "wait=60"
   532→        resp = requests.post(
   533→            f"{_REPLICATE_BASE}/models/{slug}/predictions",
   534→            headers=headers,
   535→            json={"input": {"prompt": prompt, "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
   536→                            "output_format": "webp", "output_quality": 90}},
   537→            timeout=90,
   538→        )
   539→        if not resp.ok:
   540→            return jsonify({"error": f"Replicate {resp.status_code}: {resp.text[:300]}"}), 500
   541→        pred = resp.json()
   542→        # Caminho síncrono (Prefer: wait)
   543→        if pred.get("status") == "succeeded":
   544→            out = pred.get("output")
   545→            url = out[0] if isinstance(out, list) else out
   546→            return jsonify({"url": url, "ok": True})
   547→        # Fallback polling (raro) — _t já importado no nível do módulo em Task 3
   548→        get_url = (pred.get("urls") or {}).get("get", "")
   549→        hdrs = {"Authorization": headers["Authorization"]}

   587→- [ ] **Step 1: Adicionar rota de geração de vídeo (inicia)**
   588→
   589→```python
   590→@app.route("/api/criativos/gerar-video", methods=["POST"])
   591→@login_required
   592→def criativos_gerar_video():
   593→    d = request.get_json() or {}
   594→    prompt     = (d.get("prompt_expandido") or "").strip()
   595→    modelo     = d.get("modelo", "wan-t2v-fast")
   596→    imagem_url = d.get("imagem_url")
   597→    if not prompt:
   598→        return jsonify({"error": "prompt_expandido obrigatório"}), 400
   599→    if modelo not in _CRIATIVOS_MODELOS_VIDEO:
   600→        return jsonify({"error": f"modelo inválido. Válidos: {list(_CRIATIVOS_MODELOS_VIDEO)}"}), 400
   601→
   602→    slug, tipo = _CRIATIVOS_MODELOS_VIDEO[modelo]
   603→    if tipo == "i2v" and not imagem_url:
   604→        return jsonify({"error": "imagem_url obrigatório para modelos I2V"}), 400
   605→
   606→    input_payload = {"prompt": prompt}
   607→    if tipo == "i2v":
   608→        input_payload["image"] = imagem_url
   609→
   610→    try:
   611→        headers = _replicate_headers()
   612→        resp = requests.post(
   613→            f"{_REPLICATE_BASE}/models/{slug}/predictions",
   614→            headers=headers,
   615→            json={"input": input_payload},
   616→            timeout=30,
   617→        )
   618→        if not resp.ok:
   619→            return jsonify({"error": f"Replicate {resp.status_code}: {resp.text[:300]}"}), 500
   620→        pred = resp.json()
   621→        return jsonify({"prediction_id": pred.get("id"), "ok": True})
   622→    except RuntimeError as e:
   623→        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
   624→    except Exception as e:
   625→        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
   626→```
   627→
   628→- [ ] **Step 2: Adicionar rota de status (polling do frontend)**
   629→
   630→```python
   631→@app.route("/api/criativos/status/<prediction_id>")
   632→@login_required
   633→def criativos_status(prediction_id):
   634→    try:
   635→        headers = _replicate_headers()
   636→        resp = requests.get(
   637→            f"{_REPLICATE_BASE}/predictions/{prediction_id}",
   638→            headers={"Authorization": headers["Authorization"]},
   639→            timeout=15,
   640→        )
   641→        if not resp.ok:
   642→            return jsonify({"status": "failed", "error": resp.text[:200]}), 500
   643→        pred = resp.json()
   644→        status = pred.get("status", "starting")
   645→        url = None
   646→        if status == "succeeded":
   647→            out = pred.get("output")
   648→            url = out[0] if isinstance(out, list) else out
   649→        return jsonify({"status": status, "url": url, "error": pred.get("error")})
   650→    except RuntimeError as e:
   651→        return jsonify({"status": "failed", "error": str(e)}), 500
   652→    except Exception as e:
   653→        return jsonify({"status": "failed", "error": str(e)}), 500
   654→```

   693→```python
   694→@app.route("/api/criativos/pastas", methods=["GET"])
   695→@login_required
   696→def criativos_listar_pastas():
   697→    try:
   698→        conn = _get_db(); cur = conn.cursor()
   699→        cur.execute("SELECT id, nome, criado_em FROM creative_folders ORDER BY nome")
   700→        rows = cur.fetchall(); conn.close()
   701→        return jsonify({"pastas": [dict(r) for r in rows]})
   702→    except Exception as e:
   703→        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
   704→
   705→
   706→@app.route("/api/criativos/pastas", methods=["POST"])
   707→@login_required
   708→def criativos_criar_pasta():
   709→    d = request.get_json() or {}
   710→    nome = (d.get("nome") or "").strip()
   711→    if not nome:
   712→        return jsonify({"error": "nome obrigatório"}), 400
   713→    try:
   714→        conn = _get_db(); cur = conn.cursor()
   715→        cur.execute("INSERT INTO creative_folders (nome) VALUES (%s) RETURNING id", (nome,))
   716→        novo_id = cur.fetchone()["id"]; conn.commit(); conn.close()
   717→        return jsonify({"id": novo_id, "ok": True})
   718→    except Exception as e:
   719→        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
   720→
   721→
   722→@app.route("/api/criativos/pastas/<int:pid>", methods=["DELETE"])
   723→@login_required
   724→def criativos_deletar_pasta(pid):
   725→    try:
   726→        conn = _get_db(); cur = conn.cursor()
   727→        cur.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM creative_history WHERE folder_id = %s", (pid,))
   728→        count = cur.fetchone()["n"]
   729→        cur.execute("DELETE FROM creative_folders WHERE id = %s", (pid,))
   730→        conn.commit(); conn.close()
   731→        return jsonify({"ok": True, "criativos_desvinculados": count})
   732→    except Exception as e:
   733→        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
   734→```
   735→
   736→- [ ] **Step 2: Adicionar rotas de histórico**
   737→
   738→```python
   739→@app.route("/api/criativos/historico", methods=["GET"])
   740→@login_required
   741→def criativos_listar_historico():
   742→    folder_id = request.args.get("folder_id")
   743→    tipo      = request.args.get("tipo")
   744→    page      = max(1, int(request.args.get("page", 1)))
   745→    limit     = min(50, max(1, int(request.args.get("limit", 20))))
   746→    offset    = (page - 1) * limit
   747→    where, params = [], []
   748→    if folder_id:
   749→        where.append("folder_id = %s"); params.append(int(folder_id))
   750→    if tipo in ("imagem", "video"):
   751→        where.append("tipo = %s"); params.append(tipo)
   752→    where_sql = ("WHERE " + " AND ".join(where)) if where else ""
   753→    try:
   754→        conn = _get_db(); cur = conn.cursor()
   755→        cur.execute(f"SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM creative_history {where_sql}", params)
   756→        total = cur.fetchone()["total"]
   757→        cur.execute(
   758→            f"SELECT id, tipo, modo, modelo, prompt_original, prompt_expandido, url_resultado, folder_id, criado_em "
   759→            f"FROM creative_history {where_sql} ORDER BY criado_em DESC LIMIT %s OFFSET %s",
   760→            params + [limit, offset]
   761→        )
   762→        items = [dict(r) for r in cur.fetchall()]; conn.close()
   763→        return jsonify({"items": items, "total": total, "page": page, "pages": _math.ceil(total/limit) if total else 1})
   764→    except Exception as e:
   765→        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
   766→
   767→
   768→@app.route("/api/criativos/historico", methods=["POST"])
   769→@login_required
   770→def criativos_salvar_historico():
   771→    d = request.get_json() or {}
   772→    required = ["tipo", "modo", "modelo", "prompt_original", "prompt_expandido", "url_resultado"]
   773→    missing = [f for f in required if not d.get(f)]
   774→    if missing:
   775→        return jsonify({"error": f"Campos obrigatórios: {missing}"}), 400
   776→    try:
   777→        conn = _get_db(); cur = conn.cursor()
   778→        cur.execute(
   779→            "INSERT INTO creative_history (tipo,modo,modelo,prompt_original,prompt_expandido,url_resultado,folder_id) "
   780→            "VALUES (%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s,%s) RETURNING id",
   781→            (d["tipo"], d["modo"], d["modelo"], d["prompt_original"],
   782→             d["prompt_expandido"], d["url_resultado"], d.get("folder_id"))
   783→        )
   784→        novo_id = cur.fetchone()["id"]; conn.commit(); conn.close()
   785→        return jsonify({"id": novo_id, "ok": True})
   786→    except Exception as e:
   787→        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
   788→
   789→
   790→@app.route("/api/criativos/historico/<int:hid>", methods=["DELETE"])
   791→@login_required
   792→def criativos_deletar_historico(hid):
   793→    try:
   794→        conn = _get_db(); cur = conn.cursor()
   795→        cur.execute("DELETE FROM creative_history WHERE id = %s", (hid,))
   796→        conn.commit(); conn.close()
   797→        return jsonify({"ok": True})
   798→    except Exception as e:
   799→        return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500

2326:        novo_id = cur.fetchone()["id"]; conn.commit(); conn.close()
2336:        conn = _get_db(); cur = conn.cursor()
2338:        conn.commit(); conn.close()
2350:        conn = _get_db(); cur = conn.cursor()
2352:        conn.commit(); conn.close()

# Carrega .env do projeto ou do diretório pai (ex.: /root/.env)

_VALID_TOKEN_KEYS = {"META_TOKEN_PILOTI", "META_TOKEN_DENTTO", "META_ACCESS_TOKEN"}


def _get_db():
    """Abre conexão com Neon usando DATABASE_URL do .env."""
    db_url = os.environ.get("DATABASE_URL", "").strip()
    if not db_url:
        raise RuntimeError("DATABASE_URL não definido no .env")
    return psycopg2.connect(db_url, cursor_factory=psycopg2.extras.RealDictCursor)

app = Flask(__name__, static_folder="static", template_folder="templates")
app.secret_key = os.environ.get("SESSION_SECRET") or _secrets.token_hex(32)

# ── Credenciais de acesso ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
_ADMIN_EMAIL    = os.environ.get("ADMIN_EMAIL",    "admin@jakeos.local")
_ADMIN_PASSWORD = os.environ.get("ADMIN_PASSWORD", "Jake@2024!")

# ── Auth helper ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
def login_required(f):
    @wraps(f)
    def decorated(*args, **kwargs):
        if not session.get("logged_in"):

content.text:
I now have a complete picture. Here is the full review.

---

## Code Review — Tasks 5 and 6: Video Generation + History/Folders CRUD

### Plan Alignment

All 9 routes specified in the plan are present and correctly mapped:

- `POST /api/criativos/gerar-video` — Task 5, Step 1
- `GET /api/criativos/status/<prediction_id>` — Task 5, Step 2
- `GET/POST /api/criativos/pastas` — Task 6, Step 1
- `DELETE /api/criativos/pastas/<int:pid>` — Task 6, Step 1
- `GET/POST /api/criativos/historico` — Task 6, Step 2
- `DELETE /api/criativos/historico/<int:hid>` — Task 6, Step 2
- `PATCH /api/criativos/historico/<int:hid>/pasta` — Task 6, Step 2

The async model (return `prediction_id` immediately, frontend polls `/status/<id>`) is implemented exactly as specified. No plan deviations found.

---

### What Was Done Well

The parameterized queries throughout the CRUD routes (`%s` placeholders, never string interpolation of user values) are correct. The `tipo` filter is allowlisted against `("imagem", "video")` before being appended to `params`. The `pid` and `hid` route parameters are typed with Flask's `<int:>` converter, so they are safe integers before they reach psycopg2. The `folder_id` in the WHERE clause goes through `int()` before being added to `params`. None of these represent SQL injection risk — psycopg2 parameterization handles them correctly.

The I2V validation is logically sound: the code unpacks `(slug, tipo)` from the model map, then checks `if tipo == "i2v" and not imagem_url`. This correctly rejects the only I2V model (`wan-i2v-fast`) when no image URL is provided.

---

### Issues Found

#### Critical

None.

#### Important

**1. Connection leak on exception path in every DB route.**

File: `/root/jake_desktop/app.py`, lines 2243–2246, 2259–2262, 2271–2276, 2296–2305, 2319–2326, 2336–2339, 2350–2352.

Every route follows this pattern:

```python
conn = _get_db(); cur = conn.cursor()
cur.execute(...)
rows = cur.fetchall(); conn.close()
return jsonify(...)
```

If `cur.execute()` or `cur.fetchall()` raises an exception, execution jumps to the `except` block — `conn.close()` is never called. The connection is leaked to Neon. Neon has a hard connection limit (~20 for serverless tier). Under high concurrency or during any transient DB error, this will exhaust the connection pool and cause subsequent requests to fail.

This is the same pattern already used in routes added before Tasks 5 and 6 (lines 1613–1622, 1642–1660, etc.), so it is a pre-existing systemic issue in `app.py`, not introduced here. However, Tasks 5 and 6 add 7 more routes with the same flaw. The right fix is `try/finally`:

```python
conn = _get_db()
try:
    cur = conn.cursor()
    cur.execute(...)
    result = cur.fetchall()
    conn.commit()  # for write routes
    return jsonify(...)
except Exception as e:
    conn.rollback()  # for write routes
    return jsonify({"error": str(e)}), 500
finally:
    conn.close()
```

**2. `ValueError` crash on malformed `page`, `limit`, and `folder_id` query parameters.**

File: `/root/jake_desktop/app.py`, lines 2282–2291 (`criativos_listar_historico`).

```python
page      = max(1, int(request.args.get("page", 1)))
limit     = min(50, max(1, int(request.args.get("limit", 20))))
...
if folder_id:
    where.append("folder_id = %s"); params.append(int(folder_id))
```

These three `int()` calls are outside the `try` block. A request with `?page=abc` or `?folder_id=xyz` raises an unhandled `ValueError`, which Flask catches and returns a 500 with a full traceback rather than a clean 400. This should either be wrapped in a `try/except ValueError` before the main try block, or converted with a helper that returns 400 on invalid input.

**3. `prediction_id` passed directly into a URL without sanitization.**

File: `/root/jake_desktop/app.py`, line 2220.

```python
f"{_REPLICATE_BASE}/predictions/{prediction_id}",
```

Flask's default `<prediction_id>` converter accepts any string including `/`, `..`, and other path characters. A request to `/api/criativos/status/../../files` would construct `https://api.replicate.com/v1/predictions/../../files` and hit an unintended Replicate endpoint. The fix is to add a regex converter in the route definition:

```python
@app.route("/api/criativos/status/<regex('[a-zA-Z0-9]+'):prediction_id>")
```

Or, simpler without a plugin, validate at the start of the function:

```python
import re
if not re.fullmatch(r'[a-zA-Z0-9]+', prediction_id):
    return jsonify({"status": "failed", "error": "prediction_id inválido"}), 400
```

Replicate prediction IDs are alphanumeric (e.g., `xyz123abc`). This check has zero false positives for legitimate use.

#### Suggestions

**4. `criativos_deletar_pasta` reads count but the schema already handles it via `ON DELETE SET NULL`.**

File: `/root/jake_desktop/app.py`, lines 2271–2276.

```python
cur.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) as n FROM creative_history WHERE folder_id = %s", (pid,))
count = cur.fetchone()["n"]
cur.execute("DELETE FROM creative_folders WHERE id = %s", (pid,))
```

The `creative_history.folder_id` column has `ON DELETE SET NULL`, so the database handles unlinking automatically. The COUNT SELECT is a TOCTOU race (count can change between the SELECT and DELETE in concurrent requests) and also unnecessarily exposes internal row counts to the client. The `criativos_desvinculados` field returned is informational-only with no current frontend consumer. This is minor — the behavior is correct — but the extra query is noise.

**5. `criativos_mover_pasta` does not verify that `hid` exists.**

File: `/root/jake_desktop/app.py`, lines 2348–2352.

```python
cur.execute("UPDATE creative_history SET folder_id = %s WHERE id = %s", (folder_id, hid))
conn.commit(); conn.close()
return jsonify({"ok": True})
```

If `hid` does not exist, the UPDATE silently affects 0 rows and still returns `{"ok": True}`. The frontend receives success for a no-op. Adding a `cur.rowcount` check (`if cur.rowcount == 0: return jsonify({"error": "não encontrado"}), 404`) would give the client accurate feedback.

**6. `criativos_salvar_historico` does not validate that `tipo` is in `("imagem", "video")` and `modo` is in `_CRIATIVOS_MODOS` before the INSERT.**

File: `/root/jake_desktop/app.py`, lines 2310–2326.

The DB schema has a CHECK constraint (`tipo IN ('imagem','video')`) that will enforce this, so the data will not be corrupted. But the constraint violation surfaces as a raw psycopg2 `IntegrityError` message in the JSON response rather than a clean 400. Validating at the application layer before the INSERT gives a better client-facing error.

---

### Priority Summary

| # | Severity | Issue | File / Lines |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Important | Connection leak: `conn.close()` not in `finally` block | app.py — all 7 new DB routes |
| 2 | Important | Unhandled `ValueError` on malformed `page`, `limit`, `folder_id` query params | app.py ~2282–2291 |
| 3 | Important | `prediction_id` in URL not sanitized before being forwarded to Replicate | app.py ~2220 |
| 4 | Suggestion | Redundant COUNT query before DELETE in `criativos_deletar_pasta` (TOCTOU) | app.py ~2271–2275 |
| 5 | Suggestion | PATCH move-to-folder silently returns `ok: true` when `hid` not found | app.py ~2350–2352 |
| 6 | Suggestion | POST historico does not validate `tipo`/`modo` at application layer | app.py ~2310–2326 |

Issues 1–3 should be fixed before these routes are exposed in production. Issues 1 and 2 in particular will surface under normal usage (any DB hiccup or a frontend bug sending a non-integer page parameter). Issue 3 is low-exploitation-probability given `@login_required`, but is a correctness problem regardless.
